title: 5 things God builds in your 20s
caption:
God is building the man.

You just can't see it most days.

The 20s feel like a waiting room — like you're between the important parts. That feeling is a lie. This is the most formative decade you'll ever live through. The patience you're developing because your plans aren't working yet. The self-government you're learning because you keep failing and getting back up. The sin you're choosing to bury instead of just managing.

Most men drift through their 20s and wonder why they're 35 with the same patterns and the same weaknesses. The man who understands what God is building in this decade builds something different.

"For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works." — Ephesians 2:10.

He's building you. Stay in the work.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
